## oak service inspect

Inspect a service or a specific instance

### Synopsis

Inspect a service or a specific instance.

  oak s inspect <id|name>       list all instances
  oak s inspect <id|name> 0     detailed view of instance 0
  -f / --follow                 refresh every 5 seconds

```
oak service inspect <service-id|name> [instance-number] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -f, --follow   Refresh every 5 seconds
  -h, --help     help for inspect
```
